sizing_rule.note: Portfolio-level optimal f calculation across all system combinations (A, B, C, AB, AC, BC, ABC, etc.) rather than independent system sizing. Requires calculating individual optimal f for each system first, then optimizing portfolio mix. Expected reward ratio improvement: 1.105–1.130. Specific optimal f values not provided in excerpt; requires backtesting across all combinations.

source_rule_text: Diversification across multiple market systems with their respective optimal f values increases portfolio reward while limiting drawdown, requiring calculation of optimal portfolio mix across all possible system combinations.
